title: Bray's Better Leaves
description: Make tree leaves and foliage bushier and more dimensional!
body:
# Bray's Bushy Leaves!
### **The bushy leaf add-on to my popular Vanilla+ resource pack, [Bray's World!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/braysworld)**

![Header Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11491b1ac9c29512f568bb2eb39dda121e539ab0.jpeg)

### Welcome to Bray's Bushy Leaves! This is a vanilla pack add-on that brings further dimensionality and beauty to the game of Minecraft with denser forests and foliage.

![Bushy Biomes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7b46bdc80a9221bbc5e006e63b5beba85be10cb.jpeg)

## Bray's World Official Resource Pack
This add-on is made to work seamlessly with the **Bray's World** resource pack, which aims to enhance the atmosphere of the game through custom models, variated textures and more, while maintaining that vanilla+ aesthetic!

![Brays World Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb564d2b41517ff14a0ef541c06bbd61cbb8ac96.jpeg)

<center>
  
[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b716f9bf1f25106aea330ff2308302ce911dea3a.png)](https://discord.gg/H7JPX6hPQB)
[![Youtube](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e66483ab22160e1621066e9df3c259615edd2ba9.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@BraysWorld_MC)

</center>
